The '''Wodes''' were an [[Limb/Legends|octopedal]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to a [[Wode homeworld|planet]] with a [[Gravity/Legends|gravitational]] pull twice that of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] standard. When traveling to [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] with lesser gravities, the Wodes took very heavy steps, unaccustomed to their lighter weight.<ref name="HSR" />

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], in which the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] fought against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]<ref name="RaT">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040325adv|text=Rough and Tundra|int=Rough and Tundra}}</ref> from [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the Wodes were liberated by the Republic's [[General/Legends|General]] [[Solomahal/Legends|Solomahal]].<ref name="RaT" /> At some point between [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] and [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: The Han Solo Adventures]]'', of which ''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'' is part of, to between [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]] and [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]].</ref> a number of Wodes were present on the planet [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]] at the same time that the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] was there investigating an [[Zlarb and Magg's enslavement ring|enslavement ring]].<ref name="HSR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Wodes first appeared in ''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'', a [[1979]] novel written by [[Brian Daley]] as the second volume of the ''[[Star Wars: The Han Solo Adventures]]'' trilogy.<ref name="HSR" /> "[[Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are]]," a [[1990]] [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|roleplaying game]] source article published in the [[Voyages SF 13|thirteenth issue]] of the ''[[Voyages SF]]'' magazine, introduced the [[Mahrusha sector]]'s [[Wode system]], which shared its name with the species. Since that article was released outside of the [[Lucas Licensing]] process,<ref name="Twinkle">{{VoyagesCite|13|Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are}}</ref> it is considered non-canon with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="Unlicensed">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref>
